title: Cross references
description: Generic schema for the cross-reference files in data/cross-refs/. Each cross-reference file maps a lookup key (a kanji, a word ID, a sentence ID, etc.) to an array of related identifiers. The specific kind of cross-reference is declared in the metadata.

count.description: Number of keys in the mapping.

direction.description: Human-readable description of what this cross-reference maps (e.g., 'kanji → word IDs using this kanji').

source_files.description: Paths of the data files this cross-reference was derived from.

source.description: Provenance statement per Design Principle 2 — typically 'Derived cross-reference built from <source_files> by build/transform/cross_links.py'. Not required (backward-compatible), but populated going forward for doctrinal consistency with the other data files.

license.description: License of the cross-reference file itself. Inherits from the source files (all CC-BY-SA 4.0 via EDRDG) plus the pipeline code license (CC-BY-SA 4.0). Not required (backward-compatible), but populated going forward for doctrinal consistency.
